trans-unit.source: Leave empty to inherit the value from the extension configuration. Set it to override that default for this site.

Stripe secret API key (sk_test_... in test mode, sk_live_... in live mode). Prefer referencing an environment variable so the key stays out of version control. Leave empty to inherit the extension configuration.
The signing secret (whsec_...) of the Stripe webhook endpoint, used to verify incoming events. Required for webhook confirmation; leave empty to rely on the browser return only.
Send the Stripe calls to this host instead of the real Stripe host, e.g. a proxy or a local mock server. Leave empty to use Stripe's default (https://api.stripe.com).
